hypo.Feedpy

This package provides N input beams, and each beam function can offer scalar and vector modes. 1. Gaussian beam in far field; 2. Gaussian beam near field;

Notes

  • This module defines feed field generators for scalar and vector pipelines.

  • The core outputs are callable beam functions attached to class instances.

class hypo.Feedpy.Elliptical_GaussianBeam(Edge_taper, Edge_angle, k, coor_angle, coor_displacement, polarization='scalar')

Bases: object

Elliptical Gaussian feed with independent x/y taper settings.

class hypo.Feedpy.GaussiBeam(Edge_taper, Edge_angle, freq, coord_sys, polarization='x')

Bases: object

Single-axis Gaussian feed model.
